global.description: The ad features a vibrant yellow background with fast food elements and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting late-night fast food deals with a strong call to action.

elements.label: Yellow background
elements.description: A solid yellow background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and eye-catching base.

elements.label: Food containers
elements.description: Two outlined food containers are depicted in a simple, minimalist style, suggesting fast food.

elements.label: Food containers
elements.description: Another set of outlined food containers, similar to the first, reinforcing the fast food theme.

elements.label: Food icon
elements.description: A small circular icon representing food, placed centrally to attract attention.

elements.label: Food icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon representing food, complementing the overall fast food theme.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Text in a bold font stating 'Fast food, fast' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Additional text 'Late-night deals available' is placed below the main promotional text, enhancing the message.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bold button with the text 'Install now' is located at the bottom, encouraging user interaction.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Late-night deals available

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'BiteRush' is displayed at the top left, featuring a modern and clean font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge with the text 'SALE' is positioned at the top right, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: The text 'UGC' is displayed in the top left corner, suggesting user-generated content is featured.
